name: Tom Ashworth
title: Chief Executive Officer
notes: Final approver for all recommendations. Very time-poor — 30 min max for meetings. Prefers 1-page summaries.

name: Helen Marsh
title: Chief Operations Officer
notes: Day-to-day engagement lead. Accessible. Champions change. Key ally.

name: Raj Patel
title: Chief Financial Officer
notes: Controls budget sign-off. Sceptical of consultants — prove ROI early. Likes numbers and evidence.

name: Clare Thompson
title: VP Supply Chain
notes: 25 years at RetailCo. Deep institutional knowledge. Resistant to external change — build trust slowly.

name: Mike Foster
title: VP Store Operations
notes: Enthusiastic about the engagement. Has detailed data on shrinkage and out-of-stocks. Good data source.

name: Priya Kapoor
title: Head of Data & Analytics
notes: Controls access to operational data systems. Need her buy-in for data extraction in Phase 1.

name: James Liu
title: Head of HR
notes: Needs advance notice of any workforce-related recommendations — sensitive area.

name: Sandra Brooks
title: Finance Business Partner
notes: Working-level contact for financial model in Phase 2. Very detailed and responsive.

name: Owen Davies
title: Regional Manager (South)
notes: Managing 45 stores. Will provide ground-level operational reality check.

name: Fatima Osei
title: Regional Manager (North)
notes: Managing 38 stores in North England and Scotland. Strong performance record.
